title: Cloud Engineer I
description: Rippling is seeking a Cloud Engineer I to help scale our HR platform infrastructure. You'll design and implement cloud solutions, manage deployments, and collaborate with product teams to ensure our systems can support rapid growth. If you're passionate about cloud architecture and want to work on infrastructure that powers thousands of companies, this is your opportunity.
responsibilities: Design and implement cloud infrastructure on AWS or GCP, following best practices for security and scalability
Manage containerization using Docker and Kubernetes; implement CI/CD pipelines
Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement optimizations
Collaborate with development teams to support deployment and scaling requirements
Maintain infrastructure documentation and implement infrastructure-as-code practices

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience
skills: Experience with AWS or GCP cloud platforms
Proficiency with Linux and bash scripting
Understanding of networking, databases, and system architecture
certifications: AWS Cloud Practitioner or Associate certification (preferred)

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
